news.title:
111 brokers, including Zerodha, Angel One, and Motilal Oswal, settled with SEBI over misleading algo returns claims.
SEBI imposed ₹1 lakh penalties per broker, highlighting stricter oversight on algo trading and API integrations.
news.summary:
111 brokers, including Zerodha, Angel One, and Motilal Oswal, settled with SEBI over misleading algo returns claims.
SEBI imposed ₹1 lakh penalties per broker, highlighting stricter oversight on algo trading and API integrations.

news.title:
Crude oil futures rise to Rs 9,171/barrel on MCX, Brent hits $106 amid West Asia tensions.
Geopolitical risks disrupt Strait of Hormuz shipments; EU, US explore solutions to stabilize oil flow.
news.summary:
Crude oil futures rise to Rs 9,171/barrel on MCX, Brent hits $106 amid West Asia tensions.

news.title:
Nifty 50 and Sensex saw sharp declines, fueled by US-Iran tensions, rising oil prices, and FII outflows.
Experts predict market volatility to persist; recovery depends on easing geopolitical tensions and stable crude prices.
news.summary:
Nifty 50 and Sensex saw sharp declines, fueled by US-Iran tensions, rising oil prices, and FII outflows.

news.title:
RBI mandates 100% collateral for broker funding, impacting broking firms like Motilal Oswal, Jio Financial, and Angel One.
New rules effective April 2026 include 50% collateral for exchange guarantees, restricting bank funding for proprietary trading.
news.summary:
RBI mandates 100% collateral for broker funding, impacting broking firms like Motilal Oswal, Jio Financial, and Angel One.
New rules effective April 2026 include 50% collateral for exchange guarantees, restricting bank funding for proprietary trading.
